nasb.text: They departed and came to the hill country, and remained there for three days until the pursuers returned. Now the pursuers had sought them all along the road, but had not found them.

esv.text: They departed and went into the hills and remained there three days until the pursuers returned, and the pursuers searched all along the way and found nothing.

cnv.text: 二人離去，上到山上，在那裡住了三天，等追趕的人回城去了；追趕的人一路搜尋他們，卻找不著。

ccb.text: 二人到山上躲藏了三天，等待追捕的人回去。追捕的人沿途搜索，毫无所获，便回去了。
